---
title: 'CamJ: Enabling System-Level Energy Modeling and Architectural Exploration
  for In-Sensor Visual Computing'
author:
- Tianrui Ma
- Yu Feng
- Xuan Zhang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca23-camj.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/CamJ/
journ: ISCA
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 73
---
